overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning at a commercial intersection with massive digital billboards, proceeding into a covered pedestrian walkway with distinctive geometric neon lighting, and exiting into an urban underpass. The environment features wet reflective pavement, towering futuristic architecture, and sparse pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban commercial intersection with digital advertising towers

events.description: slight turn toward the tunnel entrance while maintaining forward momentum
approaching the dark entrance of the covered pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk toward a tunnel entrance, passing digital billboards and palm trees

notable_agents.action: person wearing a bright yellow jacket walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: Massive digital screen displaying advertisements on the left building facade
Large digital billboard with neon pink and white graphics on the right building
Yellow grid pattern painted on the pavement marking a pedestrian crossing zone
Tall cylindrical pole with red and white checkered pattern near the intersection
Dark geometric entrance to the covered walkway with angular concrete framing

segments.scene_description: Walking through a futuristic urban intersection dominated by towering digital billboards and wet pavement reflecting neon lights. The camera moves steadily along the sidewalk past scattered pedestrians and palm trees, approaching a distinctive dark tunnel entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with geometric neon lighting installation

events.description: entering the covered tunnel from the open street, lighting shifts to artificial neon
pedestrian in green vest passes close to camera temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit tunnel, passing occasional pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: person in green vest and white pants walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: Angular concrete and metal structural beams forming a repeating geometric pattern overhead
Bright white linear neon lights following the angular geometry of the tunnel ceiling
Magenta neon strips illuminating the base of the tunnel walls with pink ambient glow
Bright opening at the far end of the tunnel indicating the exit

segments.scene_description: Inside a futuristic covered walkway defined by striking geometric architecture with white neon ceiling strips and pink floor lighting. The tunnel creates a corridor effect with repeating angular beams, while occasional pedestrians walk toward the camera from the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban underpass beneath highway overpass with traffic infrastructure

events.description: exiting the neon tunnel into a darker underpass area with visible traffic signals
approaching pedestrian traffic light displaying red hand symbol

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel into an underpass area with parked cars and traffic signals, continuing toward the street intersection

notable_agents.action: person crossing the path in front of the camera toward the left side

entered.detail: Massive concrete overhead structure of the highway or building above the underpass
Traffic signal pole with pedestrian walk/don't walk indicator showing red
Yellow colored vehicle parked along the left side of the underpass
White painted lines on the ground marking a pedestrian crossing area

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the neon tunnel into a dimly lit urban underpass beneath a concrete overpass. The scene shifts to show traffic infrastructure including a red pedestrian signal and parked vehicles, with the camera continuing forward toward the street exit visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, billboard-lit commercial intersection into the sterile geometry of a neon corridor and finally into a gritty urban underpass. It begins by moving steadily along a wet sidewalk where towering digital displays reflect off the pavement and palm trees line the path toward a dark tunnel entrance. As the camera enters the walkway, the open city vanishes, replaced by a corridor of repeating angular beams with white neon ceiling strips and pink floor lighting. The scene then shifts as the camera emerges from this geometric tunnel into the dim light of a concrete underpass. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal traffic infrastructure and a red pedestrian signal before the camera continues forward toward the distant street exit.
